name: Neon Exploding Bread
short_description: NEON EXPLODING BREAD is a rhythm game where you sync your mouse to hit every glowing beat flying towards you!
detailed_description:
NEON EXPLODING BREAD is an fast-paced rhythm game with simple one-handed controls! Play through over 100,000 hand-crafted levels, move your mouse to hit each beat in this minimalistic cyber world, it's satisfying when you hit all the 'Neon Floating Exploding Bread' (Quote from Jack, my little brother). Challenge yourself, your friends and beat their high scores!

Features

  • Experience the Rhythm: Dive into a seamless blend of music beats and stunning visuals!

  • Custom-Crafted Levels: In Neon Exploding Bread, you can experience your favorite songs with over 100,000 handcrafted levels available to download through the game's song browser or other online sites!

  • Simple to Start, Satisfying to Master: The easiest rhythm game ever—just move your cursor to catch the beats!
